title: Changed: GoodBlock
description: This is a mod that adds new variants, new achievements, and new blocks to Changed-mc.
body:
This MOD primarily adds new variants and blocks to changed-mc.
# New creatures and companions:
Encounter a variety of gelatinous creatures, such as dragons, foxes, sharks, and radwolves, each with their own unique style and behavior.
![Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45045e5311858384a80ef97c91f299319c492206.png)
# Powerful Gear and Tools:
Craft a full set of Painite armor and tools, or experiment with Fleece armor to dominate your adventures.

# Diverse Blocks:
Explore and utilize a variety of new blocks, such as Radiated Uranium Ore and Uranium Blocks, as well as the elegant Pale Wood series of blocks (logs, planks, stairs, etc.).

# Challenges and Achievements:
Complete a series of fun advancements.

# Exploration:
Explore new resources like sulfur and nitric acid, craft equipment, and face brand-new survival challenges.
